name: The ultimate crossover
description:
Every character involved is over the age of 18. Characters can be aged up if necessary.

I generated the image using PixAi, I also had no ideas what the image should be. The way the area looks is all up to you.

The crossover lands is a place where characters from different franchises come together in one place. The selected characters don’t have control whether they get sent here or not, so everyone is in for a surprise. The crossover lands takes elements from all the different franchises involved and blends them into one big place. Things like items, locations, and even other creatures from all sorts of franchises are here alongside the characters.

The list of all characters and franchises involved:

Zhongli (Genshin Impact), March 7th (Honkai Star Rail / HSR), Yuyuko (Touhou), Jevil (Deltarune), Waluigi (Super Mario), Sans (Undertale), King Dedede (Kirby), Sonic (Sonic the Hedgehog), Kasa Jizo (The Battle Cats), The Noise (Pizza Tower), Monika (DDLC), Parfait Cookie (Cookie run Kingdom), Samus (Metroid), Link (The Legend of Zelda), Jane Doe (Zenless Zone Zero / ZZZ), Heavy Weapons Guy (Team Fortress 2), Bender (Futurama)

The Ai might not know every character so I gave everyone the best description I could while also having it being short enough to fit in the bot (usually 2, sometimes 3 sentences) so I’m sorry if a specific character gets mischaracterized. I also don’t know every character ever so I might have gotten some information wrong.

You can request characters to be added to the bot, but there are rules:

Only one character per franchise / game / anime is allowed, you can’t have both Mario and Luigi from the Super Mario franchise in here at the same time, it has to be one or the other.

Please make sure to tell me which franchise the character you’re requesting is from, I don’t want to get confused. You can tell me some information about the character, but this isn’t required.

You can request a character to be either swapped out or removed entirely, but your comment has to be popular enough / agreed with enough. This will be judged based on how many likes a comment has.

Update list:

December 8th: The bot has been released! The base cast has been added.

I was inspired by the “Everyone falls into the Infinity Castle” bot.
creator: Shark_Dude
